ai_summary: Aditya Vision Limited reported an exceptional Q1 FY24, with robust YoY growth across all key financial metrics, including revenue up 46.23% and PAT up 41.26%, driven by strong 28% same-store sales growth and aggressive store expansion. Material impacts include a significant Rs.93 crore reduction in net debt to Rs.91.79 crores and successful strategic market penetration in Jharkhand and Uttar Pradesh. No significant red flags were identified, as the company effectively managed inventory, maintained gross margins above 15%, and is on track to surpass its store expansion targets for the fiscal year.
